completeness.notes: Drafted from krexa.mintlify.app/docs/api/* + www.krexa.xyz/developers; extended via Krexa team's onboarding notes for invite redemption, KYA ownerSignature format, and the new Pay.sh proxy gateway. Covers KYA (4), Score (1), Credit (4 incl. score-breakdown only doc'd on the dev landing page + request-credit confirmed by the team), Oracle (1), Vault (1), Faucet (1), Access (3 — provision-key from the dev page + challenge/redeem confirmed by the team), Pay.sh (13 incl. legacy x402 catalog + new proxy providers/quote endpoints). KyaCredential inner shape is left as a loose object with additionalProperties:true — the 7 sections (identity, principal, permissions, score, reputation, financial, attestation) are not fully reified upstream. ScoreResponse also stays loose to avoid integer/float mismatches under tighten-spec single-sample inference. ownerSignature on POST /solana/credit/{agent}/request is CONFIRMED to be base64 Ed25519 over the raw 32-byte agent pubkey, signed with the owner keypair (NOT a challenge string, NOT base58 — different from /access/provision-key). Invite redemption signs `Krexa invite redemption: <code> for <wallet>` with the agent keypair, base58. Pay.sh proxy gateway (POST /solana/paysh/proxy/{provider}/{route}) uses a wildcard path that does not fit OpenAPI cleanly — hand-rolled with reqwest in apps/krexa/src/tool.rs::ProxyCall. Auth shims live at apps/krexa/src/auth.rs (KREXA_API_KEY for the X-API-Key header; KREXA_AGENT_SECRET_KEY for invite-redemption signatures; KREXA_OWNER_SECRET_KEY for KYA ownerSignature). Two servers listed: production api.krexa.xyz and the Render origin (cold-start 30-60s).
